calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Motion To Stay All Probate Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Steinle for D'Andre White. Carlos Alvarez for Ana Edith Contreras. Steven Kahn for Jamal Harris and Carl Harris.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to staying the Probate proceedings and appointment of administrator. Mr. Steinle argued that the stay should include the appointment of administrator and that the appointment can wait until the end. Mr. Alvarez argued the down side of not appointing an administrator. The Court is inclined to sign an Order appointing a neutral administrator (Public Administrator) first and then sign the Order to Stay the Probate Proceedings. The Court instructed counsel to prepare two orders (one for appointment of administrator and one for staying of the probate proceedings) and to have them approved as to form by all counsel. The Clerk raised the issue with notice not given to the Public Administrator's Office for this hearing and that their acceptance is needed.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: None. (Not Reported)

Motion And M.P.A. In Support Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Declararion Of J. Harris In Oppsition To D'Andre White'S Petition For Probate Of Will Amd For Letters Testamentary.
Off Calendar Apr-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Steinle for D'Andre White (Moving Party). Steven Kahn for James Harris and Carl Harris. Carlos Alvarez for Edith Contreras.

Mr. Alvarez reported that they have agreed to strike some portions of the declaration and that he has emailed a highlighted copy to the Probate Examiner. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the disputed portions and the related actions (Criminal and Quite Title). After hearing the arguments, the Court ordered that the motion is stayed pending the result of the Quite Title actions. Furthermore, the Court set a hearing on May 15, 2014 at 2:30 p.m. for a Motion to Stay All Probate Proceedings with the Motion/Supporting Brief to be filed by May 2, 2014 and Opposition to be filed by May 8, 2015.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Continued To Oct-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION For Order Authorizing And Declaring Title To Real Property Be Vested In Petitioner.
Off Calendar Sep-20-2013 Continued To Oct-21-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Kahn for Jamal Harris (Petitioner).

Counsel presented oral argument to support his position with regard to D'Andre's intent to quitclaim 100% interest of the property, and stated that D'Andre has been personally served with this petition and that he has not responded. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Sep. 20, 2013: At the request of and agreement of Counsel, the matter is back on calendar and continued to October 21, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

PETITION For Order Authorizing And Declaring Title To Real Property Be Vested In Petitioner.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Continued To Sep-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Kahn for and with Jamal Harris. Ana Contreras (purchaser of home from Nephew of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Kahn stated that D'Andre was personally served on July 5, 2013 and that he has not heard from him. The Court stated that it would like points and authorities/a brief on when D'Andre quit claimed the property, whether or not D'Andre has a 50% interest, that the porperty is not all of the Mother's property and whether the Creditor can receive 100% of the property. The Petition for Order Authorizing and Declaring Title to Real Property, etc. was continued to September 9, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris. (Not Reported)
